---
title: "Methods"
toc: true
execute:
  echo: false
---

```{r}
#| include: false
targets::tar_source('R')
```



# Selecting metrics

Criteria: 

- highly cited, unavailable
- direct extension of available functions in spatsoc
- biology


Not selected:

(mFLICA table 1)

- mFLICA 
  - available
- FLOCK
- LPD
- Granger causality
- Influence maximization


# Metrics defined

For each

- Citation
- Interpretation 
- Formula
- Code example


# Case study
